name: Pistachio Swirl Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 Can (14 oz.) sweetened condensed milk - divided
3 Packages (6 oz. each) semisweet chocolate pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cream cheese in a small glass bowl and microwave on HIGH (100%) for 15 to 25 seconds, or until softened.
2. Add 2 tablespoons of the sweetened condensed milk and vanilla extract. Beat on low speed just until smooth; set aside.
3. In a 2-quart microwave-safe bowl, combine remaining sweetened condensed milk, semisweet chocolate, and butter. Microwave on medium (50%) for 2 to 3 1/2 minutes, or until the mixture is smooth and glossy, stirring twice.
4. Stir in chopped pistachio nuts.
5. Spread chocolate mixture evenly into a prepared pan.
6. Drop cream cheese mixture by spoonfuls over the chocolate; swirl lightly over the chocolate.
7. Let stand until firm, or place in refrigerator to set.
8. Cut into 25 even squares by making 4 lengthwise and 4 crosswise cuts equidistant from each other.
9. Then cut each square diagonally in half.
10. Store in an airtight container with waxed paper between layers. Makes 50 pieces.
